name: Sour Cream Rolls at Sweetwater Inn
recipeInstructions:
Heat sour cream until very hot. Add salt, sugar and butter.
Cool until lukewarm. Dissolve yeast in 1/2 cup warm water.
Add sour cream mixture, eggs, and the flour. Cover and refrigerate overnight. Divide dough into 4 parts. Knead and roll into a 10-inch circle. Cut into pie-shaped pieces, then roll each piece like a crescent roll and place on greased baking sheet. After rising, bake at 375 degrees for 12-15 minutes. Makes 50 crescent rolls or 200 small biscuit-shaped rolls for ham and biscuits.
